data.param: {"input":"{\"aspect_ratio\":\"3:4\",\"prompt\":\"Dramatic, realistic editorial photograph, vertical portrait orientation, ink-black (#101010) background. Base color grading is desaturated, near-monochrome grayscale — skin, wood, clothing all read as neutral gray/black tones, NOT sepia or brown. The only warm color allowed is a narrow golden-yellow rim/key light striking the stamp, the edge of the ticket, and the key — confined to specular highlights and rim edges, not an overall amber/sepia color wash across the whole frame. High-contrast, high-end studio editorial photography.\\n\\nScene: extreme close-up on a barbershop reception counter. A barber's hand, out of focus sleeve/cuff at the edge of frame, presses a small rubber ink stamp onto a paper parking validation ticket resting on a dark wood counter. The ticket is a plain, generic paper stub with no visible text, numbers, or logos on it. Beside the ticket, a single car key with a plain unbranded leather keychain sits on the counter. Soft out-of-focus barbershop interior (chairs, mirrors) blurred in the background.\\n\\nLighting: single dramatic warm gold key light raking low across the counter from one side, catching the texture of the paper ticket and the metal of the stamp, deep shadows falling to pure black elsewhere. Shallow depth of field, cinematic.\\n\\nComposition: keep the stamping hand, ticket, and key in the lower half of the frame. Leave the upper half and one full side of the frame as clean, softly out-of-focus dark negative space for later text overlay.\\n\\nAbsolutely no text, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no watermarks, no graphic overlays, no UI elements anywhere in the image — pure photography only, a clean background plate.\",\"resolution\":\"2K\"}","model":"gpt-image-2-text-to-image"}
